title: DB Schema Migration — Add currencyCode and targetAmountCents to TransactionEntity
description: Add currency tracking fields to the transaction table. Bump DB version to 6 with destructive migration. This is the foundation for all other multi-currency tasks.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-114' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-114' to ingest requirements
Write a failing unit test in FinanceDatabaseUnitTest.kt asserting that TransactionEntity has currencyCode and targetAmountCents fields (Red Phase)
Add `val currencyCode: String` and `val targetAmountCents: Long? = null` to TransactionEntity data class
Ensure `.fallbackToDestructiveMigration()` is set in the Room builder (check DatabaseModule or AppModule in di/)
Build project — verify it compiles (schema change will break mapper — fix stubs if needed to compile, but leave mappers for TASK-115)
definition_of_done: TransactionEntity has non-null currencyCode: String and nullable targetAmountCents: Long?
All modified files have @trace TASK-114 annotation
